narrative: Hawkish Fed bets and Hormuz risk premiums anchor the dollar as the week's dominant G10 theme — USD +0.811% vs NZD -1.691% (spread 2.502%); Fed 3.75% vs RBNZ 2.25% (+150bp) carry sustains the divergence. USD/JPY holds at 161.72 with a +275bp carry advantage, though moderate put skew in 25d RR suggests hedging against intervention; gold higher +0.00%; equities -0.05%; DXY +0.01%; VIX 18.4. Watch US NFP on Friday for the next directional catalyst.
